title: varlink: use standard date format and specify it in the docs
body:
The varlink API returns times quite often (for example for when containers and images were created), but the documentation doesn't specify what format this time is in. Currently, it returns what golang's `time.String()` outputs, for example `2019-01-16 21:24:39.666388579 +0000 UTC`.

It would be nice if podman could document which format it outputs and used a standard format, such as RFC 822.

Podman version: 1.0.0
